title: Irkutsk、Irkutsk Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Irkutsk、Irkutsk Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Irkutsk是Irkutsk Oblast的一个城市，人口约620,000。The cultural capital of Eastern Siberia, a historic city near Lake Baikal with beautiful wooden architecture and a vibrant Decembrist heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
